{{CargoRelic
|name=George VI's Speech
|class_id=22076
|rank=Blue
|affct=CIV
|birthday=08-20
|source=Lottery Machine No.2 (0.07%), Wishing (0.03%)
|description=On Aug 20, 1939 AD, this speech was handed over to King George VI.<br>This speech was used by King George VI of Britain in his mobilization speech during World War II. At that time, George V passed away, and his successor, Edward VIII, abdicated the throne for love. George VI, who suffered from severe stuttering, was pushed to the throne. With the help of a speech therapist Rogge, after undergoing a series of training, he finally overcame his psychological barriers and successfully delivered the famous Christmas speech, which was a moral boost for British soldiers and people.
|fame=32
|art=29
|fth=26
|civ=46
|tech=21
|ss1=Per 10 Mutant Minions in battle:<br>> Troop ATK +1
|ss2=Per 10 Mutant Minions in battle:<br>> Troop ATK +2
|ss3=Per 10 Mutant Minions in battle:<br>> Troop ATK +3
|ss4=Per 10 Mutant Minions in battle:<br>> Troop ATK +5
|ss7=Per 10 Mutant Minions in battle:<br>> Troop ATK +5<br>Per 10 Mutant Minions in battle:<br>> Troop ATK +5 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Biozilla skill I.png|50px]]Place in a Biozilla: In Species War, All Minion ATK +1%
}}
